offer: For consulting agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month, paperwork delays cause onboarding bottlenecks. We streamline onboarding instead of manual onboarding processes using email and paper forms.
problem: Delays in onboarding new hires due to manual paperwork processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for consulting agencies
Indie Hackers discussions about onboarding solutions
DM outreach to consulting agencies with demo video
Community forums where agencies share workflow tools
try_it: Let users try template-based onboarding forms and status tracking for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
